record_types.name: CFG1_Register

fields.name: FTHVL
fields.description: Behavior of slave transmitter at underrun condition

fields.name: UDRCFG
fields.description: Detection of underrun condition at slave transmitter

fields.name: TXDMAEN
fields.description: Length of CRC frame to be transacted and compared

record_types.name: CFG2_Register

fields.name: Reserved_8_14
fields.description: Swap functionality of MISO and MOSI pins

fields.name: CPOL
fields.description: Software management of SS signal input

fields.name: SSOE
fields.description: SS output management in master mode

record_types.name: CR1_Register

fields.name: Reserved_1_7
fields.description: Master automatic SUSP in Receive mode

fields.name: CRC33_17
fields.description: CRC calculation initialization pattern control for receiver

fields.name: RCRCI
fields.description: CRC calculation initialization pattern control for transmitter

fields.name: TCRCI
fields.description: Read-only. Locking the AF configuration of associated IOs

record_types.name: CR2_Register

fields.name: TSIZE
fields.description:
Read-only. Number of data transfer extension to be reload into TSIZE
just when a previous

record_types.name: I2SCFGR_Register

fields.name: DATLEN
fields.description: Channel length (number of bits per audio channel)

record_types.name: IER_Register

fields.name: DPXPIE
fields.description: EOT, SUSP and TXC interrupt enable

fields.name: MODFIE
fields.description: Additional number of transactions reload interrupt enable

record_types.name: IFCR_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_2
fields.description: Write-only. End Of Transfer flag clear

fields.name: EOTC
fields.description: Write-only. Transmission Transfer Filled flag clear

fields.name: CRCEC
fields.description: Write-only. TI frame format error flag clear

record_types.name: SPI_Peripheral
SR_Register

fields.name: TXTF
fields.description: Read-only. Underrun at slave transmission mode

fields.description: Read-only. Additional number of SPI data to be transacted was reload

fields.name: RXWNE
fields.description: Read-only. Number of data frames remaining in current TSIZE session
